---
description: "A web version of my academic curriculum vitae, automatically synchronized with my ORCID record."
toc: false
page-layout: full
body-classes: "top-level-page cv-page"
---

::: {.page-heading}
# Curriculum vitae
:::

::: {.cv-intro}
This web CV is synchronized with my ORCID record and supplemented with manually maintained teaching and service information.

[Download the PDF](files/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

{{< include _generated/cv-orcid.md >}}
